hooks.command: IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=PermissionRequest" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=PostToolUse" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=PostToolUseFailure" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=PreToolUse" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=SessionStart" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=SubagentStart" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=SubagentStop" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true

IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT="${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT:-}"; IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT=$(cat ~/.impala/hook-port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT" ] && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT}/" --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_INHERITED_HOOK_PORT"; else IMPALA_HOOK_PORT="$IMPALA_DISCOVERED_HOOK_PORT"; fi; if [ -n "$IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$IMPALA_HOOK_PORT" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:${IMPALA_HOOK_PORT}/hook" --url-query "event_type=UserPromptSubmit" --url-query "worktree_path=${IMPALA_WORKTREE_PATH}" --url-query "pane_id=${IMPALA_PANE_ID}" --url-query "agent_provider=${IMPALA_AGENT_PROVIDER}" --data-binary @- --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; else cat >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; true
